text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yeah… you're right. Next time, 
let's try… a higher mountain.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Nothing beats standing atop a chilly peak… 
and enjoying a hot cup of coffee as your 
breath turns white… hehe…

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Maybe next time… you'll be more 
willing to have a cup of my brew.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes… Let's have a long chat… I can hear your 
voice clearly… in the quiet mountain air.
